description_long: This apartment building complex is composed of three interconnected rectangular wings forming a U-shape, with each wing featuring multiple floors and a flat roof. The exterior is primarily light gray with prominent red vertical and horizontal accents at the corners and around the entrances. Large, regularly spaced windows line the facades, providing ample natural light to the interior units. The building includes open balcony spaces along the inner sides of the U, and the flat roofs suggest the possibility of rooftop access or communal areas. The structure appears to be constructed from reinforced concrete and glass, with metal railings on the balconies. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for dense urban environments.
description: A modern U-shaped apartment building with multiple floors, light gray facades, red accents, and large windows. Features open balconies and flat roofs, ideal for urban settings.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the U-shaped layout with all three wings visible, highlighting the open central courtyard and the flat roofs.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the rear and side elevations, emphasizing the regular window arrangement and the red accent panels at the building's ends.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the front facade with the main entrance area and the symmetrical arrangement of windows and balconies.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a perspective of the side and rear wings, showing the depth of the building and the consistent balcony design.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in a regular, grid-like pattern along all facades, with consistent spacing and alignment across each floor. The arrangement is symmetrical and evenly distributed, contributing to a uniform appearance.
